# truenas_api_key (Data Source)

Fetches information about an existing TrueNAS API key.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_api_key" "example" {
  name = "terraform-managed-key"
}

output "api_key_username" {
  value = data.truenas_api_key.example.username
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the API key. At least one of id or name must be provided.
- `name` (String) The name of the API key. At least one of id or name must be provided.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the API key.
- `expires_at` (String) The expiration date of the API key.
- `revoked` (Boolean) Whether the API key has been revoked.
- `username` (String) The username associated with the API key.
